reviews.text:
I first spoke with Ryan, the person in charge at Reno, back in May. He was very patient and spent a long time discussing things with us. After moving into our new home, I invited a few other companies for quotes, but in the end, I still chose Renostars.

Their price wasn’t the lowest, but the quote was clear and transparent. During the renovation, there were occasional extra charges for additional work, but they were reasonable.

The workers were also great—they showed up early every day and even stayed late sometimes. If any issues came up during the renovation, I just mentioned them in the WeChat group, and they responded quickly. Jasper was mainly responsible for the on-site work, and he suggested adding an extra pot light. It turned out to be a great idea—the final result looks fantastic.
reviews.textZh:
我第一次与Reno的负责人Ryan交谈是在五月。他非常耐心，花了很长时间与我们讨论事情。在搬进新家后，我邀请了其他几家公司报价，但最后我还是选择了Renostars。

他们的价格不是最低的，但报价清晰透明。在装修过程中，偶尔会有额外的费用用于额外的工作，但这些都是合理的。

工人们也很棒——他们每天都早到，有时甚至会加班。如果在装修过程中出现任何问题，我只需在微信群里提一下，他们就会迅速回应。Jasper主要负责现场工作，他建议增加一个额外的灯具。结果证明这是个好主意——最终效果非常棒。

reviews.text:
We worked with Reno Stars Construction on a partial renovation of our townhouse (2.5 bathrooms, kitchen, and entry tile work) and were extremely happy with the experience. The team of Ryan, Sylvia and Jasper was professional, communicative, and excellent problem solvers. As a bonus, they delivered the project well ahead of schedule.

We actually recommended them to a friend before our renovation was even completed, based solely on the outstanding customer service. High-quality work and a smooth, stress-free process. We would absolutely recommend Reno Stars Construction.
reviews.textZh:
我们与Reno Stars Construction合作，对我们联排别墅的部分装修（2.5个浴室、厨房和入口瓷砖工作）感到非常满意。Ryan、Sylvia和Jasper的团队专业、沟通顺畅，解决问题的能力也很出色。作为额外的惊喜，他们提前完成了项目。

在装修完成之前，我们就已经向朋友推荐了他们，完全是基于他们出色的客户服务。高质量的工作和顺利无压力的过程。我们绝对会推荐Reno Stars Construction。

reviews.text: We hired Reno Stars for a partial renovation of our main bathroom and we're very pleased with their process and the result. Sylvia was responsive and easy to communicate with, the team responded quickly and effectively to our feedback, and we couldn't be happier with how our bathroom looks now! We also found that their pricing was very fair and transparent. Overall we have nothing negative to say about the company or their workers, they made the renovation process simple. We'll definitely be considering Reno Stars again for when we do more renovations in the future.
reviews.textZh: 我们雇佣Reno Stars对主浴室进行了部分装修，我们对他们的流程和结果非常满意。Sylvia反应迅速，沟通起来很方便，团队对我们的反馈也快速有效，我们对现在的浴室效果感到非常满意！我们还发现他们的定价非常公平和透明。总的来说，我们对公司或他们的工人没有任何负面评价，他们让装修过程变得简单。未来我们肯定会考虑Reno Stars进行更多的装修。

reviews.text: Reno Stars completed a full renovation of our townhouse, including replacing the entire flooring, stairs, kitchen cabinets, tiles, lighting, and reworking the bathrooms. The quality of their work is excellent, and the pricing was very reasonable for the scope of the project. Communication was great — they were always responsive and kept us updated throughout the process. The team was efficient, professional, and delivered high-quality results. Highly recommend Reno Stars for any home renovation project.
reviews.textZh: Reno Stars完成了我们联排别墅的全面装修，包括更换整个地板、楼梯、厨房橱柜、瓷砖、照明和重新改造浴室。他们的工作质量非常出色，定价对于项目的范围来说也非常合理。沟通非常顺畅——他们总是能及时回应，并在整个过程中保持我们更新。团队高效、专业，交付了高质量的结果。强烈推荐Reno Stars进行任何家庭装修项目。

reviews.text: We worked with Reno Stars this June and July and can't be any happier working with Ryan and his team. We had a tight budget and we didn’t want to spend too much on an old property. He came to the location, took a lot of notes of our demands, provided recommendations. They were not the cheapest but not the most expensive. I thought Reno Stars is a reliable renovation contractor after I met with Ryan. He also presented a flexible payment plan for the renovations. We kept communicating through Whatsapp and his response time was quick and helpful. There were minor hiccups after and during the renovations but he was able to get them fixed quickly. We will definitely keep in touch with Reno Stars when we planned our next renovation and I highly recommend their services. They are reliable, responsive and helpful. Thanks Ryan, and sorry for the late review.
reviews.textZh: 我们在今年六月和七月与Reno Stars合作，和Ryan及他的团队合作让我们感到非常开心。我们预算紧张，不想在老房子上花太多钱。他来到现场，详细记录了我们的需求，并提供了建议。他们的价格不是最低的，但也不是最贵的。在见到Ryan后，我认为Reno Stars是一个可靠的装修承包商。他还为装修提供了灵活的付款计划。我们通过Whatsapp保持沟通，他的响应时间很快且很有帮助。在装修前后有一些小问题，但他能够迅速解决。我们肯定会在计划下一个装修时与Reno Stars保持联系，我强烈推荐他们的服务。他们可靠、反应迅速且乐于助人。谢谢你，Ryan，抱歉迟来的评价。
